member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DefaultServiceProviderFactory
member.summary: Default implementation of .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DefaultServiceProviderFactory.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.DefaultServiceProviderFactory.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified .
member.param: The options to use for this instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionContainerBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for building a from an .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionContainerBuilderExtensions.BuildServiceProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Creates a containing services from the provided .
member.param: The containing service descriptors.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionContainerBuilderExtensions.BuildServiceProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a containing services from the provided optionally enabling scope validation.
member.param: The containing service descriptors.
true to perform check verifying that scoped services never gets resolved from root provider; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionContainerBuilderExtensions.BuildServiceProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderOptions)
member.summary: Creates a containing services from the provided optionally enabling scope validation.
member.param: The containing service descriptors.
Configures various service provider behaviors.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.CallSiteFactory.ValidateTrimmingAnnotations(System.Type,System.Type[],System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Validates that two generic type definitions have compatible trimming annotations on their generic arguments.
member.remarks: When open generic types are used in DI, there is an error when the concrete implementation type has [DynamicallyAccessedMembers] attributes on a generic argument type, but the interface/service type doesn't have matching annotations. The problem is that the trimmer doesn't see the members that need to be preserved on the type being passed to the generic argument. But when the interface/service type also has the annotations, the trimmer will see which members need to be preserved on the closed generic argument type.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.CallSiteFactory.CreateArgumentCallSites(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceIdentifier,System.Type,Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.CallSiteChain,System.Reflection.ParameterInfo[],System.Boolean)
member.returns: Not null if throwIfCallSiteNotFound is true

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.CallSiteFactory.VerifyOpenGenericAotCompatibility(System.Type,System.Type[])
member.summary: Verifies none of the generic type arguments are ValueTypes.
member.remarks: NativeAOT apps are not guaranteed that the native code for the closed generic of ValueType has been generated. To catch these problems early, this verification is enabled at development-time to inform the developer early that this scenario will not work once AOT'd.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceCacheKey.ServiceIdentifier
member.summary: Type of service being cached

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceCacheKey.Slot
member.summary: Reverse index of the service when resolved in IEnumerable<Type> where default instance gets slot 0. For example for service collection IService Impl1 IService Impl2 IService Impl3 We would get the following cache keys: Impl1 2 Impl2 1 Impl3 0

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceCacheKey.Equals(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceCacheKey)
member.summary: Indicates whether the current instance is equal to another instance of the same type.
member.param: An instance to compare with this instance.
member.returns: true if the current instance is equal to the other instance; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceLookup.ServiceCallSite
member.summary: Summary description for ServiceCallSite

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProvider
member.summary: The default IServiceProvider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProvider.GetService(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the service object of the specified type.
member.param: The type of the service to get.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProvider.GetKeyedService(System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Gets the service object of the specified type with the specified key.
member.param: The type of the service to get.
The key of the service to get.
member.exception: The value is used for when is not an enumerable based on .

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredKeyedService(System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Gets the service object of the specified type.
member.param: The type of the service to get.
The key of the service to get.
member.exception: The service wasn't found or the value is used for when is not an enumerable based on .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderOptions
member.summary: Options for configuring various behaviors of the default implementation.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderOptions.ValidateScopes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether validation is performed to ensure that scoped services are never resolved from the root provider.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceProviderOptions.ValidateOnBuild
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether validation is performed to ensure all services can be created when is called.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Internal.TypeNameHelper.GetTypeDisplayName(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Char)
member.summary: Pretty print a type name.
member.param: The .
true to print a fully qualified name.
true to include generic parameter names.
true to include generic parameters.
Character to use as a delimiter in nested type names

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that certain members on a specified are accessed dynamically, for example through .
member.remarks:
This allows tools to understand which members are being accessed during the execution of a program.
This attribute is valid on members whose type is or .
When this attribute is applied to a location of type , the assumption is that the string represents a fully qualified type name.
When this attribute is applied to a class, interface, or struct, the members specified can be accessed dynamically on instances returned from calling on instances of that class, interface, or struct.
If the attribute is applied to a method it's treated as a special case and it implies the attribute should be applied to the "this" parameter of the method. As such the attribute should only be used on instance methods of types assignable to System.Type (or string, but no methods will use it there).

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute.#ctor(System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified member types.
member.param: The types of members dynamically accessed.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMembersAttribute.MemberTypes
member.summary: Gets the which specifies the type of members dynamically accessed.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes
member.summary:
Specifies the types of members that are dynamically accessed.
This enumeration has a attribute that allows a bitwise combination of its member values.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.None
member.summary: Specifies no members.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicParameterlessConstructor
member.summary: Specifies the default, parameterless public constructor.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicConstructors
member.summary: Specifies all public constructors.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicConstructors
member.summary: Specifies all non-public constructors.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicMethods
member.summary: Specifies all public methods.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicMethods
member.summary: Specifies all non-public methods.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicFields
member.summary: Specifies all public fields.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicFields
member.summary: Specifies all non-public fields.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicNestedTypes
member.summary: Specifies all public nested types.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicNestedTypes
member.summary: Specifies all non-public nested types.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicProperties
member.summary: Specifies all public properties.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicProperties
member.summary: Specifies all non-public properties.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicEvents
member.summary: Specifies all public events.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicEvents
member.summary: Specifies all non-public events.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.Interfaces
member.summary: Specifies all interfaces implemented by the type.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicConstructorsWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public constructors, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicMethodsWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public methods, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicFieldsWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public fields, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicNestedTypesWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public nested types, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicPropertiesWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public properties, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.NonPublicEventsWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all non-public events, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicConstructorsWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all public constructors, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.PublicNestedTypesWithInherited
member.summary: Specifies all public nested types, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllConstructors
member.summary: Specifies all constructors, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllMethods
member.summary: Specifies all methods, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllFields
member.summary: Specifies all fields, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllNestedTypes
member.summary: Specifies all nested types, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllProperties
member.summary: Specifies all properties, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.AllEvents
member.summary: Specifies all events, including those inherited from base classes.

member.name: F:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.DynamicallyAccessedMemberTypes.All
member.summary: Specifies all members.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCodeAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the specified method requires the ability to generate new code at runtime, for example through .
member.remarks: This allows tools to understand which methods are unsafe to call when compiling ahead of time.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCodeAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified message.
member.param: A message that contains information about the usage of dynamic code.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCodeAttribute.ExcludeStatics
member.summary: When set to true, indicates that the annotation should not apply to static members.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCodeAttribute.Message
member.summary: Gets a message that contains information about the usage of dynamic code.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresDynamicCodeAttribute.Url
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional URL that contains more information about the method, why it requires dynamic code, and what options a consumer has to deal with it.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute
member.summary: Suppresses reporting of a specific rule violation, allowing multiple suppressions on a single code artifact.
member.remarks: is different than in that it doesn't have a . So it is always preserved in the compiled assembly.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class, specifying the category of the tool and the identifier for an analysis rule.
member.param: The category for the attribute.
The identifier of the analysis rule the attribute applies to.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Category
member.summary: Gets the category identifying the classification of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property describes the tool or tool analysis category for which a message suppression attribute applies.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.CheckId
member.summary: Gets the identifier of the analysis tool rule to be suppressed.
member.remarks: Concatenated together, the and properties form a unique check identifier.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Scope
member.summary: Gets or sets the scope of the code that is relevant for the attribute.
member.remarks: The Scope property is an optional argument that specifies the metadata scope for which the attribute is relevant.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Target
member.summary: Gets or sets a fully qualified path that represents the target of the attribute.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument identifying the analysis target of the attribute. An example value is "System.IO.Stream.ctor():System.Void". Because it is fully qualified, it can be long, particularly for targets such as parameters. The analysis tool user interface should be capable of automatically formatting the parameter.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.MessageId
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional argument expanding on exclusion criteria.
member.remarks: The property is an optional argument that specifies additional exclusion where the literal metadata target is not sufficiently precise. For example, the cannot be applied within a method, and it may be desirable to suppress a violation against a statement in the method that will give a rule violation, but not against all statements in the method.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.UnconditionalSuppressMessageAttribute.Justification
member.summary: Gets or sets the justification for suppressing the code analysis message.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute
member.summary: Indicates that the specified public static boolean get-only property corresponds to the feature switch specified by name.
member.remarks: IL rewriters and compilers can use this to substitute the return value of the specified property with the value of the feature switch.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified feature switch name.
member.param: The name of the feature switch that provides the value for the specified property.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.FeatureSwitchDefinitionAttribute.SwitchName
member.summary: The name of the feature switch that provides the value for the specified property.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with a field or property member.
member.param: The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.#ctor(System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the list of field and property members.
member.param: The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute
member.summary: Specifies that the method or property will ensure that the listed field and property members have not-null values when returning with the specified return value condition.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and a field or property member.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated field or property member will not be null.
The field or property member that is promised to be not-null.

member.name: M:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String[])
member.summary: Initializes the attribute with the specified return value condition and list of field and property members.
member.param: The return value condition. If the method returns this value, the associated field and property members will not be null.
The list of field and property members that are promised to be not-null.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.ReturnValue
member.summary: Gets the return value condition.

member.name: P:System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.MemberNotNullWhenAttribute.Members
member.summary: Gets field or property member names.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerLoweringPreserveAttribute
member.summary: When applied to an attribute class, instructs the compiler to flow applications of that attribute, from source code down to compiler-generated symbols. This can help IL-based analysis tools.
member.remarks: One example where this attribute applies is in C# primary constructor parameters. If an attribute marked with gets applied to a primary constructor parameter, the attribute will also be applied to any compiler-generated fields storing that parameter.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.CompilerServices.CompilerLoweringPreserveAttribute.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute
member.summary: Attribute used to indicate a source generator should create a function for marshalling arguments instead of relying on the runtime to generate an equivalent marshalling function at run-time.
member.remarks: This attribute is meaningless if the source generator associated with it is not enabled. The current built-in source generator only supports C# and only supplies an implementation when applied to static, partial, non-generic methods.

member.name: M:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the .
member.param: Name of the library containing the import.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.LibraryName
member.summary: Gets the name of the library containing the import.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.EntryPoint
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the entry point to be called.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.StringMarshalling
member.summary: Gets or sets how to marshal string arguments to the method.
member.remarks: If this field is set to a value other than , must not be specified.

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.StringMarshallingCustomType
member.summary: Gets or sets the used to control how string arguments to the method are marshalled.
member.remarks: If this field is specified, must not be specified or must be set to .

member.name: P:System.Runtime.InteropServices.LibraryImportAttribute.SetLastError
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the callee sets an error (SetLastError on Windows or errno on other platforms) before returning from the attributed method.

member.name: T:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling
member.summary: Specifies how strings should be marshalled for generated p/invokes

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Custom
member.summary: Indicates the user is supplying a specific marshaller in .

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Utf8
member.summary: Use the platform-provided UTF-8 marshaller.

member.name: F:System.Runtime.InteropServices.StringMarshalling.Utf16
member.summary: Use the platform-provided UTF-16 marshaller.

member.name: P:System.SR.AmbiguousConstructorException
member.summary: Unable to activate type '{0}'. The following constructors are ambiguous:

member.name: P:System.SR.CannotResolveService
member.summary: Unable to resolve service for type '{0}' while attempting to activate '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.CircularDependencyException
member.summary: A circular dependency was detected for the service of type '{0}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.UnableToActivateTypeException
member.summary: No constructor for type '{0}' can be instantiated using services from the service container and default values.

member.name: P:System.SR.OpenGenericServiceRequiresOpenGenericImplementation
member.summary: Open generic service type '{0}' requires registering an open generic implementation type.

member.name: P:System.SR.ArityOfOpenGenericServiceNotEqualArityOfOpenGenericImplementation
member.summary: Arity of open generic service type '{0}' does not equal arity of open generic implementation type '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.TypeCannotBeActivated
member.summary: Cannot instantiate implementation type '{0}' for service type '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.NoConstructorMatch
member.summary: A suitable constructor for type '{0}' could not be located. Ensure the type is concrete and services are registered for all parameters of a public constructor.

member.name: P:System.SR.ScopedInSingletonException
member.summary: Cannot consume {2} service '{0}' from {3} '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.ScopedResolvedFromRootException
member.summary: Cannot resolve '{0}' from root provider because it requires {2} service '{1}'.

member.name: P:System.SR.DirectScopedResolvedFromRootException
member.summary: Cannot resolve {1} service '{0}' from root provider.

member.name: P:System.SR.ConstantCantBeConvertedToServiceType
member.summary: Constant value of type '{0}' can't be converted to service type '{1}'

member.name: P:System.SR.ImplementationTypeCantBeConvertedToServiceType
member.summary: Implementation type '{0}' can't be converted to service type '{1}'

member.name: P:System.SR.AsyncDisposableServiceDispose
member.summary: '{0}' type only implements IAsyncDisposable. Use DisposeAsync to dispose the container.

member.name: P:System.SR.GetCaptureDisposableNotSupported
member.summary: GetCaptureDisposable call is supported only for main scope

member.name: P:System.SR.InvalidServiceDescriptor
member.summary: Invalid service descriptor

member.name: P:System.SR.ServiceDescriptorNotExist
member.summary: Requested service descriptor doesn't exist.

member.name: P:System.SR.CallSiteTypeNotSupported
member.summary: Call site type {0} is not supported

member.name: P:System.SR.TrimmingAnnotationsDoNotMatch
member.summary: Generic implementation type '{0}' has a DynamicallyAccessedMembers attribute applied to a generic argument type, but the service type '{1}' doesn't have a matching DynamicallyAccessedMembers attribute on its generic argument type.

member.name: P:System.SR.TrimmingAnnotationsDoNotMatch_NewConstraint
member.summary: Generic implementation type '{0}' has a DefaultConstructorConstraint ('new()' constraint), but the generic service type '{1}' doesn't.

member.name: P:System.SR.AotCannotCreateEnumerableValueType
member.summary: Unable to create an Enumerable service of type '{0}' because it is a ValueType. Native code to support creating Enumerable services might not be available with native AOT.

member.name: P:System.SR.AotCannotCreateGenericValueType
member.summary: Unable to create a generic service for type '{0}' because '{1}' is a ValueType. Native code to support creating generic services might not be available with native AOT.

member.name: P:System.SR.NoServiceRegistered
member.summary: No service for type '{0}' has been registered.

member.name: P:System.SR.InvalidServiceKeyType
member.summary: The type of the key used for lookup doesn't match the type in the constructor parameter with the ServiceKey attribute.

member.name: P:System.SR.KeyedServiceAnyKeyUsedToResolveService
member.summary: KeyedService.AnyKey cannot be used to resolve a single service.

member.name: P:System.SR.NoKeyedServiceRegistered
member.summary: No keyed service for type '{0}' using key type '{1}' has been registered.

member.name: T:System.ExceptionPolyfills
member.summary: Provides downlevel polyfills for static methods on Exception-derived types.
